name: Brightspace Daily Updates
description: Scans all 4 Brightspace courses for new announcements, assignments, and content. Updates the dashboard in real time.

name: Brightspace Grade Sync
description: Scrapes grades from all 4 Brightspace courses and updates the Grade Tracker page.

name: Weekly To-Do Generator
description: Pulls upcoming assignments from Brightspace and generates the weekly to-do list. Preserves existing checked-off items.

name: Professor Email Scan
description: Scans Outlook inbox for emails from your 4 professors and updates the Professor Emails page.
